testcase.name: Response has service name and version

testsuite.name: 01_Functional / GET latest readings returns items array
01_Functional / GET reading by saved reading_id returns 200
02_Auth / POST reading without token returns 401
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0
--- testScriptError: Unexpected token 'I' at 1:1 Internal Server Error ^ ---

testcase.name: Missing token returns 401

failure.message: expected response to have status code 401 but got 500

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 7705cd74-b412-4213-ac60-721e0de64363. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab04 IoT Docker Verification. Request name: 02_Auth / POST reading without token returns 401. Test description: Missing token returns 401. Error message: expected response to have status code 401 but got 500. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 401 but got 500 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:5).

testsuite.name: 02_Auth / POST reading with wrong token returns 401
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0
--- testScriptError: Unexpected token 'I' at 1:1 Internal Server Error ^ ---

testcase.name: Wrong token returns 401

failure.message: expected response to have status code 401 but got 500

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 7705cd74-b412-4213-ac60-721e0de64363. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab04 IoT Docker Verification. Request name: 02_Auth / POST reading with wrong token returns 401. Test description: Wrong token returns 401. Error message: expected response to have status code 401 but got 500. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 401 but got 500 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:6).

testsuite.name: 03_Negative / POST reading missing device_id returns validation error
03_Negative / POST reading with value as string returns validation error
04_Boundary_Reliability / POST boundary temperature 80 is accepted with warning

testcase.name: High temperature response includes warning header

testsuite.name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / GET health responds under 1000ms on local/container
